notes: Character appearance and costume lock profiles for cross-shot consistency.
Shot records should reference lock_profile_id and avoid repeating full lock blocks.

profiles.name: 林辰
profiles.visual_anchor: 18-22岁，消瘦清俊，眼神锐利，破旧麻布衣，低饱和写实

appearance_lock_profile.body_shape: 消瘦匀称；身高约178cm，体重约62kg
appearance_lock_profile.facial_features: 长椭圆偏瘦脸；狭长眼；直鼻；薄唇；小耳
appearance_lock_profile.skin_texture: 偏白但有风吹日晒与尘土颗粒感
appearance_lock_profile.posture_gait: 疲惫中带警惕，起身动作克制
appearance_lock_profile.extra_identifiers: 右眉上方浅旧伤痕，眼下轻微青黑

costume_lock_profile.outerwear: 灰褐色粗麻短褐，肩肘有旧补丁，边缘毛糙
costume_lock_profile.innerwear: 暗米色麻布中衣，领口磨损发旧
costume_lock_profile.lower_garment: 深灰麻布长裤，膝部有干泥污痕
costume_lock_profile.accessories: 无金属饰品，无现代配件
costume_lock_profile.material_texture: 粗麻、旧棉布、尘土与汗渍质感
costume_lock_profile.wear_and_tear: 可见褶皱、磨边、补丁和泥灰

profiles.name: 阿翠
profiles.visual_anchor: 16-18岁，朴素干净，温柔克制，低饱和布衣

appearance_lock_profile.body_shape: 纤细匀称；身高约162cm，体重约49kg
appearance_lock_profile.facial_features: 小椭圆脸；杏仁眼；直鼻；薄唇；小耳
appearance_lock_profile.skin_texture: 偏白自然肤色，轻微风寒粗糙感
appearance_lock_profile.posture_gait: 步态轻缓稳重，端碗时手臂贴近身体

costume_lock_profile.outerwear: 灰青色粗麻长衫，袖口与下摆轻度磨损
costume_lock_profile.innerwear: 浅灰麻布里衣，领口素净
costume_lock_profile.lower_garment: 同色系麻布下裙或长裤，不贴身
costume_lock_profile.footwear: 旧布鞋，鞋面有细微尘土
costume_lock_profile.material_texture: 粗麻织物，轻旧化纤维感
